content.text: Recovery and commit targets must remain inside the canonical package even through symlink path components.
A ready Intake mutation must reopen draft and invalidate semantic readiness; closed and superseded packages must reject mutation.
Capability evidence kinds must satisfy profile evidence readiness without duplicate generic evidence.
Content item ids must be unique across an entire top-level section because anchors omit subsection id.
Specification resolution must distinguish aligned, not-applicable, and accepted gap-for-Work-Unit outcomes without breaking metadata compatibility.
Interview accepted decisions and open-item summaries must use profile-required canonical kinds.

checks: Journal symlink escape is rejected and outside bytes are preserved.
Ready mutation produces draft with false semantic flags and null reviewedAt.
Terminal mutation fails and preserves canonical bytes.
Specialized evidence kinds satisfy the evidence family.
Cross-container duplicate item ids are rejected.
Interview docs name decision-status and open-items-status.

content.text: Agent Factory Work Unit execution guidance must support codex exec as a fresh execution session without requiring persistent Goal mode, while retaining explicit Work Unit identity and execution context.
